core_mechanism: an exact fluctuation-symmetry relation on the probability distribution of a time-integrated observable, in which the probabilities of opposite-signed values are tied by an exponential factor (log-ratio P(+A)/P(-A) linear in A), linking macroscopic irreversibility to the statistics of an underlying time-reversible stochastic dynamics
brief_reason: The abstract describes how time-averaged fluctuations of driven many-particle systems obey analytic relations that make irreversibility emerge from reversible dynamics and quantify the asymmetry between forward and reverse fluctuations, which is exactly a fluctuation-relation symmetry on the distribution of a time-integrated quantity.
